Release notes for version 3.11 with new features, bug fixes, and performance improvements.

# Purpose
The content describes updates and improvements for Pebble smartwatches. It highlights new vibration patterns, enhanced Pebble Health sleep tracking, and timeline snooze features for Time-series watches. It also mentions bug fixes and performance improvements for all models, with additional information available at `blog.getpebble.com`.
